title: Relaxed drunkening calmness — four-line social-presence rules
html:
Relaxed drunkening calmness — four-line social-presence rules

Source: 2023-04-21 Apple Note. Four-line manifesto on how to be the most present version of yourself in social settings. Junior-spring at OSU, pre-Jo-breakup. The earliest in-vault articulation of what later becomes the magnetic aura / normal neutral to everything doctrine.

TL;DR

  • Title-as-thesis: "relaxed drunkening calmness" — the ideal social state is the loose-but-aware register of being mildly buzzed without alcohol.
  • "Out of internal insecurity" → operate from secure ground, not anxious bidding.
  • "All about other person" → conversational generosity as the move.
  • "FUNNY" → humor as the carrier.
  • "ABOVE ALL THE REST: Fouss staring into eyes" — eye-contact intensity (Fouss = friend-source) named as the highest-leverage move.
  • Same family as later magnetic aura, normal neutral to everything, and piercing prompts frameworks.

Quotes

  • "ABOVE ALL THE REST: Fouss staring into eyes" — eye contact is the topmost rule.

Pattern

Earliest "how to be in a room" note. The vocabulary is messier than later versions (Sep 2024 manifesto) but the orientation is the same: presence > performance.

Open questions

  • Who is Fouss? (Friend whose eye-contact game became a teaching example — single mention.)
  • Did the "drunkening calmness" framing carry forward, or get replaced by "max effort commit" / "soul as beacon" later?

Related

  • magnetic aura
  • normal neutral to everything
  • piercing prompts
  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever
  • soul as beacon

related.label: Never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want — 14-line Shanghai manifesto
